title: Soak Test - Headset disconnected, app in the foreground, phone idle
scenario: App remains responsive after prolonged idle on Home Screen with headset disconnected
steps: 1. Install and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Pair a Poly Bluetooth headset with the phone via the app.
4. Navigate to the app Home screen (the headset should be shown as disconnected).
5. Leave the phone idle with the app in the foreground for several hours (e.g., overnight).
6. After the idle period, check whether the app is still running and responsive.
expected: The app remains running and responsive after prolonged idle time. No app crash, freeze, or memory leak occurs.
